antipattern.reason: View becomes untestable in isolation; business logic locked to HTTP.
Utils stops being pure; tests now require the DB.

antipattern.description: Celery task body computes pricing, sends emails, writes DB rows directly.
antipattern.reason: Same logic cannot run synchronously (from a view or REPL). Tasks become hidden services.

antipattern.description: Services imports from views OR utils imports from services.
antipattern.reason: Circular import errors at startup; layer isolation broken.
Stripe wrapper now app-specific; replacing/upgrading the wrapper risks the entire billing app.
Partial-write left after exception; data integrity violated.
